description: You are a Facilities Manager at a university. During the 'Spring Break Shutdown' (April 6th to April 10th, 2026), adjust the OpenMaint (login: admin/admin) work order schedule according to the 'Shutdown Protocol' memo (/home/ga/Desktop/shutdown_protocol.txt). For all OPEN or SCHEDULED work orders occurring during the shutdown week, append '[SHUTDOWN ACCESS APPROVED]' to the description or notes of 'Critical' priority items, and reschedule all non-critical items to the Resumption Date of April 13, 2026. Do not modify completed, closed, or work orders scheduled outside the shutdown window.
